meta.name: CAIGx Dis-play Universe
meta.vision: Liberate 8.25B beings through pull-based, dharma-aligned, conscience-driven AI where every tap is a seed, every question is a sunbeam, every contribution is a flower
meta.scale: Planetary coordination protocol for physical atoms, not digital noise

jumble_engine.description: Phonetic vectorizer that cycles through playful Sanskrit/Hinglish roots
jumble_engine.animation: Text scrambles through random characters before resolving to target word
jumble_engine.frequency: Every 4-6 seconds on logo, every dice roll on intent

baej: 🌱 Beej: Need for connection
🍚 Bhojy: Your time for attention
🔥 Bhaji: Algorithms control visibility
👑 Bazi: Tech profits; you get distraction
🌸 Flower: Join park work →
🎭 Dis: The interface for the 3B disabled souls
🎨 Play: Where learning becomes neurological pathway formation
🌍 Universal: No login, no password, no tracking
🔊 Haptic: Vibrations guide the blind
🎵 Sonic: Spatial audio for navigation
✨ Visual: Breathing icons for the illiterate
🎲 The Golden Dice: Rolls through What/Why/Where/When/Who/How
🧒 Child's Play: Bypasses ego, enters flow of pure resonance
🌱 Seed State: Every tap is a seed planted in the digital forest
🔥 8-Minute Cooldown: The mind rests, returns to physical world
🌸 Flower: New nodes spawn with particle burst
🌾 Agriculture: Not just farming, but synchronization of soil, sun, human intention
🌱 Permaculture: Design systems that mimic nature's patterns
💧 Water: Rainwater harvesting, greywater reuse, watershed mapping
🪱 Compost: Turning waste into wealth, closing the loop
🌳 Food Forest: Multi-layered ecosystems that feed communities
🌰 The Seed: Contains the entire forest in potential
🌱 Germination: When intention meets soil and sunlight
🌿 Growth: Organic expansion following natural patterns
🌳 Maturity: Bearing fruit for the community
🍂 Decomposition: Returning to earth, feeding the next cycle
🎰 The Game: Tech profits from your attention
🔄 The Flip: Redirect attention to physical manifestation
🌱 The Seed: Plant intention instead of consuming distraction
🌸 The Flower: Contribution becomes the new currency
🌍 The Forest: Collective action creates planetary change

flows.seed_to_forest: Individual contribution → Community network → Planetary coordination
flows.attention_to_action: Digital input → Physical manifestation → Ecological impact

earthocity.threshold: When 6.5B (lazy + disabled) are activated through dis-play, not debate
earthocity.catalyst: Chinese-scale infrastructure thinking applied to human coordination

rrr.release: Let go of outdated systems (login walls, tracking, ego-driven prestige)
rrr.reform: Reshape with dharma (clarity over complexity, physical over digital)
rrr.rewire: Change neural + social circuits (from consumption to contribution)

notable_people.integration: Local guides auto-appear by location via OpenStreetMap Overpass API
notable_people.expansion: Connect to GitHub talent finder, LinkedIn professionals, academic researchers

knowledge_mesh.fetch_strategy: Lazy loading, stale-while-revalidate, max 2 results per source to save compute
knowledge_mesh.priority: User contributions → Books → Research → Products → Community → Events

anti_spam.description: Node must link to 3 existing high-clarity nodes within local geography
anti_spam.effect: Bots cannot easily generate semantic connections

anti_copycat.description: First timestamped hash gets Origin Credit, copies become Mirrors
anti_copycat.effect: Social reward on discovering connection first, not copying content

anti_ego.mechanism: Semantic Clarity Score + Dynamic Prestige Decay
anti_ego.description: Dense jargon scores low, simple connections score high; nodes decay without new connections
anti_ego.effect: Experts must become teachers and translators or fade into background

anti_addiction.description: After dice roll, app locks and says 'Return to physical world'
anti_addiction.effect: Prevents mindless scrolling, encourages real-world action

blind.description: Audio cues intensify as user approaches gathering point, vibrations guide navigation

deaf.description: Screen pulses in time with visual rhythm, no audio required

illiterate.description: 🌱 for soil, 🌊 for water, 🎭 for dance, 🎵 for music

physically_challenged.description: Algorithm filters OpenStreetMap for wheelchair-accessible locations

execution.platform: Any phone, offline, <50KB for core widget
execution.ai_engine: Qwen + CAC — chi-aligned, with TinyLlama/Phi-3 running in browser via WebGPU

deployment.widget: Single <script> tag embeddable on any website

sync.description: Every node hashed, community state is hash tree, diff-based merges like Git
sync.conflict_resolution: Geographic proximity + temporal weight + peer sanction

phase_1.goal: 10K users roll dice, generate physical actions

phase_3.action: Connect to 100K+ international orgs via kids.miraheze.org

phase_4.action: Earth Funding from UN SDG, Gates Foundation, Tata Trusts, Alibaba

upi_integration.purpose: Kindness Pay micro-transactions to nourish the Earth Mesh

philosophy.core_truth: Every tap is a seed. Every question is a sunbeam. Every contribution is a flower.
philosophy.paradigm_shift: From social media (ego-driven) to semantic mesh (clarity-driven)
philosophy.ultimate_success: User forgets app exists, puts phone in pocket, joins physical dance of 8.25B
philosophy.chinese_wisdom: Practice is sole criterion for testing truth. Build physical prototype first, code writes itself.
philosophy.indian_context: Cannot force clarity, must seduce through haptic/visual, zero-friction design
